reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: Should use 'tmp' instead of 'v' to correctly traverse neighbors of dequeued vertex.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  Error: should use Graph[tmp][i] instead of Graph[v][i]; otherwise BFS only explores neighbors of the starting vertex.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error] Graph[v][i] should be Graph[tmp][i] because the BFS explores neighbors of the currently dequeued vertex 'tmp', not the starting vertex 'v'.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Inside the BFS loop, 'v' is the starting vertex passed to the function, but it should be 'tmp' (the current vertex dequeued) to correctly explore neighbors of the current node.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [In BFS, when exploring neighbors of 'tmp', the code incorrectly uses 'v' (the starting vertex) instead of 'tmp'. This causes wrong adjacency checks and leads to incorrect traversal.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [In BFS traversal, it should check adjacency of 'tmp', not 'v'. Using 'v' here causes incorrect neighbor exploration.]

20.reason: The loop condition should be 'front < back'. Using '<=' causes an extra iteration when the queue is empty, leading to processing uninitialized/zero values and incorrect output.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  The loop condition should be 'front < back'. Using '<=' causes an extra iteration when the queue is empty, leading to processing uninitialized/zero values and incorrect output.
